code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut has_pos = false
mut max_val = 0
mut token = ""

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(token)
        match string.parse_int(token)
        when Some(v)
          if v > 0
            if not has_pos
              max_val = v
              has_pos = true
            else if v > max_val
              max_val = v
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        token = ""
      end
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if not string.is_empty(token)
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(v)
    if v > 0
      if not has_pos
        max_val = v
        has_pos = true
      else if v > max_val
        max_val = v
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

if has_pos
  println("max=#{max_val}")
else
  println("none")
end
